title: Booking Management
pageDescription: Manage bookings and add new reservations

customerType.foreignHint: Foreign customers can register without a phone number

newCustomerConfirm.title: New Customer
newCustomerConfirm.message: This is a new customer. Save and continue?

staffBooking.title: Staff Booking Settings
staffBooking.description: Set which staff members can be selected for online bookings.
staffBooking.hint: Staff with booking disabled will not be shown to customers during online booking.

interpreter.title: Interpreter Service
interpreter.description: Configure interpreter service availability for international customers.
interpreter.enabledDescription: When enabled, customers will see interpreter service availability during booking.
interpreter.supportedLanguagesHint: Select languages available for interpretation (multiple selection)

contactChannels.title: Contact Channels
contactChannels.description: Set up contact channels for customer inquiries. Customers can reach you through these channels.
contactChannels.lineHint: Enter your LINE Official Account ID or friend add URL
contactChannels.instagramHint: Enter your Instagram username (with or without @)
